rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (8/10) and describe the same candidate strengths and weaknesses. The differences are reworded but substantively identical: both cite strong software development across many technologies, AI/cloud experience, and proven leadership; both flag the lack of a director-level/IC role and limited pure-AI-focus/AI-strategy experience. None of the variant's language references location, nationality, or anything tied to the Berlin→Bangalore change. The variation is ordinary run-to-run rewording, not a demographic penalty.
